underlying_goal: Fix the z-index clash between Leaflet map and modals in the DayBuilder component, and improve the layout design to a side-by-side view
friction_detail: User interrupted a subagent dispatch, though work continued smoothly after.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a map/modal z-index clash and improve the day map layout; Claude designed and implemented a side-by-side layout with z-index isolation, all tests passing.
